description: Create a new support ticket in Vtiger CRM with the following details: Title 'API gateway returning 503 errors under load', Organization 'Apex Dynamics Inc', Contact Name 'Robert Chen', Priority 'High', Severity 'Major', Status 'Open'. Description: 'Production API gateway (api.apexdynamics.com) returning HTTP 503 Service Unavailable errors when request rate exceeds 500 req/sec. Started after deployment of v2.4.1 on Feb 14. Connection pool exhaustion suspected - max_connections set to 100 but monitoring shows 98 active connections during peak. Impacting 3 downstream microservices: auth-service, order-service, and notification-service. Rollback to v2.4.0 is being evaluated

metadata.expected_title: API gateway returning 503 errors under load
